title: Dashbord view without giving permissions to the parents boards
excerpt:
Hello, 
We would like to give access to dashboards to our team and some clients, but not to give them access to the parent boards that have sensitive information. 
I would really appreciate voting for this feature. 
Adi

posts.author: adibar (adi)
